summary: Comprehensive testing of Smart Security Monitoring System v2.0 completed. Advanced features including risk scoring, email alerts, enhanced dashboard, and enhanced logs are working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Device fingerprinting not increasing risk score for different devices
minor_bugs.impact: Device change detection may not be working optimally

passed_tests: API connectivity and basic endpoints working
Authentication for both USER and ADMIN roles
Advanced risk scoring with high-risk detection (70+ score)
Email alerts triggered for high-risk logins
Enhanced dashboard API with all 5 metrics (totalLogins, failedAttempts, highRiskLogins, alertsTriggered, suspiciousActivityCount)
Enhanced logs API with device info, IP address, and alert columns
User role restrictions (USER cannot access admin endpoints)
Fixed routing: USER redirects to /home, ADMIN redirects to /dashboard
USER and ADMIN login flows working
Dashboard displays all 5 metric cards correctly
Activity and Risk Distribution charts visible
Enhanced logs page with Device Info, IP Address, and Alert columns
Navigation between dashboard, logs, and users pages working
